violations.text: No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to use dishwasher to WASH ONLY. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized at the 3-bay sink until dishwasher is repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to sanitize equipment and utensils in 3 bay sink until dishwasher is repaired. PIC made service call during inspection. PIC to send proof of repairs to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
